title: Sign Clipboard
description: Adds a clipboard to copy and paste text between signs
body:
![Image showing Signs and Sign Clipboard from the mod](https://i.imgur.com/fL9qssB.png "Banner")
# Sign Clipboard
Easy way of copying and pasting text between signs.  

## Usage
Simply craft a Sign Clipboard and Sneak Right Click on a sign to copy it. This will give you a Filled Sign Clipboard.  
Filled Sign Clipboard stores the text that you can then Sneak Right Click on other signs to paste.  

## Recipe
Recipe takes any kind of sign.  
![Sign Clipboard Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/gr2IdLG.png "Recipe")
